meta.description: Every 6h: list a project's tasks via MCP and escalate any that are past due and not done (priority -> high) with a low-impact tasks.update. Scoped identity wf:task-sla -> [tasks.list, tasks.update]. Single-project by SLA_PROJECT_ID (tenant-wide sweep is target-state — needs a tenant-scoped tasks.list tool). Env: HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, SLA_PROJECT_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "tasks.list", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID, projectId: $env.SLA_PROJECT_ID } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "tasks.update", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID, taskId: $json.taskId, priority: "high" } } }) }}
